title: Indicators
description: Adds blocks for teams to indicate whether a teams indicatorblock was destroyed or not
body:
Adds blocks to indicate whether they have been destroyed or not. If an indicator is placed, it sends a tellraw message in the chat. Same goes for if that indicator is destroyed

There are 7 different colours for the indicators: Blue, Red, Yellow, Green, Orange, Cyan and Magenta.

There is also a Super-Indicator for each colour which can only be destroyed when every other indicator of the same color is already destroyed.

The mod was made to indicate the existence of a team, comparable to bedwars, but it doesnt really add any interaction to existing team-mods.
